zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gifford於1278年出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾時，他的父親William Gifford19歲，母親William Gifford-1歲。他和Euphemia Morham至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1345年11月在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安也斯特也斯特 卡素享年67歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Gifford was born in 1278, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, his father, William Gifford, was 19 and his mother, William Gifford, was -1. He had at least 2 sons with Euphemia Morham. He died about November 1345, in Yester Castle, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Midlothian, Scotland.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Euphemia Morham. Il est décédé environ novembre 1345, à Yester Castle, Yester, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Midlothian, Écosse.

ja.lifeSummary: John Giffordが1278年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Giffordは19歳，母William Giffordは-1歳であった。彼はEuphemia Morhamとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1345年11月にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンイエスターイエスター カストルで67歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gifford(이)가 1278년 스컷랜드 피블레실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gifford(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 William Gifford(은)는 -1세였다. 그는 Euphemia Morham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1345년 11월 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 예스터 카스틀에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Euphemia Morham. Ele faleceu aproximadamente novembro de 1345, em Yester Castle, Yester, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gifford родился в 1278 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Gifford было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали William Gifford, -1. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Euphemia Morham. Он умер около ноябрь 1345 г. в местности иестир кастл, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности мидлотян, Шотландия.
